mnemonics: Machine Learning: Mice Eat Delicious Nachos
keyPoints: Feature Engineering: Creating new features from existing ones to improve model performance
Dimensionality Reduction: Reducing the number of features in a dataset to improve model performance and prevent overfitting
Principal Component Analysis (PCA): A technique used for dimensionality reduction by projecting data onto a lower dimensional space
Feature Selection: Selecting the most relevant features from a dataset to reduce noise and improve model performance
Correlation Analysis: Measuring the correlation between features to identify redundant or irrelevant features
Recursive Feature Elimination (RFE): A technique used for feature selection by recursively eliminating the least important features
LLE (Local Linear Embedding): A technique used for dimensionality reduction by preserving local structure
t-SNE (t-distributed Stochastic Neighbor Embedding): A technique used for dimensionality reduction by preserving local structure and non-linear relationships
